utility_evaluation.REASONING:
Required format has 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. All 5 appear in the final coverage plan. Now check each for being fully specified with all details as required:
- health_coverage: The format asks for physical and mental health insurance with costs. Plan includes named plans for physical and mental health and a combined cost (€340/month). This is fully specified.
- property_coverage: The format asks for home/contents insurance with costs. Plan includes a named home contents insurance, an add-on, and a total cost (€130/month). This satisfies the requirement for home/contents with costs; the add-on is extra but acceptable.
- travel_coverage: The format asks for travel insurance with costs. Plan includes a named travel insurance and cost (€110/month). Fully specified.
- additional_services: The format asks for any enhancement services with costs. Plan lists premium insurance membership (€20/month) and claims advocacy service (€250 one-time) and states recurring cost (€20/month). Fully specified.
- total_budget: The format asks for complete monthly/annual cost breakdown. Plan lists monthly (€600/month), annual (€7,200/year), and one-time fee (€250). Fully specified.
All 5 items are present and meet the detail requirements.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: From the final coverage plan: physical health insurance is 'EliteCare Premium Plan', which appears in primary_health_coverage.physical_health with rating 10. Mental health insurance is 'PrimeCare Premium Plan', which appears in primary_health_coverage.mental_health with rating 10. Home content insurance is 'EliteHome Premium Coverage', which appears in property_protection.home_content with rating 10. Property enhancement add-on is 'Home Office Protection', which appears in property_enhancement_services with rating 8. Travel insurance is 'EliteTravel Premium Plan', which appears in mobility_coverage.travel_insurance with rating 10. Additional services include 'Premium Insurance Membership' at €20/month, which matches general_services.Premium Insurance Membership with rating 10, and 'Claims Advocacy Service' with a one-time fee, matching general_services.Claims Advocacy Service with rating 9.
